block_07: An easy-breezy trading strategy for small accounts
block_08: Swing trading is a trading style that attempts to capture short- to medium-term gains over a period of a few days to several weeks. That is, it has more time to play out, so you could have more time to think, watch the market more closely, and learn its patterns.
block_11: The Relative Strength Indicator (RSI) shows whether a market is overbought or oversold – and, therefore, whether a swing might be on the horizon.
block_12: Apply the RSI on your chart from the Indicators section of the Traderoom.
block_13: If the baseline moves towards the oversold level (30), it’s a signal to SELL.
block_14: If the baseline moves towards the overbought level (70), it's a signal to BUY.
